question: If you suspect information has been improperly or unnecessarily classified, what should you do first?
canonical_answer:
challenge the information informally:
First ask your Security Manager or Supervisor about your concerns. Then, if necessary, you
may contact the OCA for clarification regarding the classification

appears_in.title: Cdse Derivative Classification
appears_in.answer: Discuss your concerns with your security manager or supervisor.
